'''Spidery nightgliders''' were rare animals native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Altarrn]]. Considered premium pets, they were sold at [[Sabodor's/Legends|Sabodor's]] pet shop on the planet [[Etti IV/Legends|Etti IV]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{Mo}}
